title: Memory's Dogma CODE:01
notes: Performance is good and everything works. Though you need to install quartz and ffdshow through winetricks to get the mpeg videos to play.
The game crashes after playing an hour. It doesn't matter if quartz and ffdshow is installed. I think it is because the game wants to play a cute scene.
